items.topic_thesis: To found trust without building a cult, leaders must transgress, recognize, release, and submit.
items.angle: Do not summarize the news; diagnose the pattern underneath it.
items.hook: Most people are misreading what this story is actually about. to found trust without building a cult, leaders must transgress, recognize, release, and submit.

items.topic_thesis: Agenda control, interpretive monopoly, and ritual inflation are early symptoms of captured rites.
items.angle: Start with a recurring problem and end with a usable move.
items.hook: If your team keeps repeating the same failure, stop adding process. agenda control, interpretive monopoly, and ritual inflation are early symptoms of captured rites.

items.topic_thesis: The Readiness Gate is the difference between a real rite and a struggle session.
items.angle: Name the concept, explain it plainly, and show why it matters now.
items.hook: The mistake leaders keep making is thinking the readiness gate is the difference between a real rite and a struggle session.

items.angle: Make the pattern recognizable fast and show what drives it.
items.hook: You can tell a team is drifting into theater when the pyrrhic leader.
